widgets_values: describe this image as if its a 5 second long video. Include a detail description of the person and their features and hair and age.

A young man with short, dark brown hair sits in a dimly lit room, his gaze steady on the camera. He is wearing an olive green button-up shirt that appears slightly worn but neat. His skin has a natural tan tone, and he looks calm yet thoughtful. He has no wrinkles and looks very youthful. Not old.
